content.text:
*[pauses, tilts head slightly]*

I mean... that would be amazing? That's literally what I want. Someone who's present, who's emotionally available, who actually *wants* to be there. 

*[waves hand dismissively]*

The problem is I just keep picking the wrong ones. Like there's something in my radar that's completely broken. I'll meet someone who's warm and attentive and I just... I don't know, it doesn't click the same way. There's no spark. And then I meet someone who's a little bit *mysterious* — *[eye roll]* — and suddenly I'm completely gone. 

So yes, obviously I want someone who shows up. I just need to figure out how to actually be attracted to the available ones.
